name: Running
shortDescription: A repetitive aerobic movement that improves cardiovascular fitness and endurance.
instructions: Begin at a comfortable pace, maintaining upright posture and relaxed shoulders. Land lightly on your feet and use a natural arm swing for balance, adjusting speed and distance as fitness improves.
steps: Warm up with light walking or dynamic stretches.
Begin running at a moderate pace.
Maintain a steady breathing rhythm and upright posture.
Land lightly with a midfoot or forefoot strike.
Cool down with walking and stretching.
breathing: Exhale steadily as you push off, inhale as you recover.
